heading: Administrative costs
label: 10306 Administrative costs
text: From the sums appropriated pursuant to this chapter, not more than 7.5 per centum shall be utilized for administrative costs.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Water Resources Research Act of 1984, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 98–24298 Stat. 97section 10301 of this titleMar. 22, 1984
